services.name: Deluxe Haircut & Styling
services.description: Signature haircut, shampoo wash, scalp massage, and custom blow-dry blow styling.

services.name: Premium Beard Grooming
services.description: Hot towel prep, detailed straight-razor lineup, trimming, and organic beard oil treatment.

services.name: The Royal Service (Combo)
services.description: Deluxe haircut combined with Premium Beard Grooming and a refreshing charcoal peeling mask.

services.name: Classic Face Massage & Facial
services.description: Rejuvenating mud mask, steaming hot towels, facial massage, and hydrating sunscreen application.
